title: Reflection Record
description: Post-execution reflection written to Postgres. Used for skill extraction and learning.

job_id.description: Reference to job that generated this reflection

what_worked.description: Specific outcomes, approaches, or tools that succeeded

what_failed.description: What did not work, blockers encountered, or failed attempts

pattern_observed.description: If a reusable pattern emerged, describe it here

context_type.description: Type of context in which task was executed (e.g., 'intake_form', 'blog_post', 'schema_migration')

tool_sequence.description: Ordered list of tools or techniques used (e.g., ['regex_classify', 'markdown_format', 'schema_validate'])

success_signal.description: Measurable signal that task succeeded (e.g., 'all files validated against schema', 'test suite passed')

sensitivity_level.description: Access level for this reflection (controls skill extraction and sharing)

skill_extraction_attempted.description: Whether skill extraction pass has run on this reflection

skills_extracted.description: IDs of skills created or updated from this reflection
